title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!
